projects.title: AI Content Systems at Intuit
projects.tagline: Designing AI-assisted content infrastructure to scale clarity, consistency, and access
projects.summary: Built an AI-assisted content system that structured ~4,000 help articles, enabling faster authoring, consistent reuse, and expanded access for support teams.

projects.title: Tax Season Content Automation
projects.tagline: Replacing a daily 30-60 minute manual workflow with a single Python command
projects.summary: Identified and automated a complex, error-prone daily workflow during tax season that involved CSV exports, Smartsheet updates, and WordPress publishing. Reduced a 10-step manual process to a single 5-second command, eliminating systematic errors including duplicate rows and formatting issues.

projects.title: Professional Tax Product Form Help
projects.tagline: Designing in-product, form-level guidance within a regulated tax environment
projects.summary: Designed preventative content layer for hundreds of tax forms, reducing errors and support dependency through contextual guidance at moment of need.

projects.title: CGI Meditation Experiences
projects.tagline: VR meditation app designed to enhance remote worker well-being
projects.summary: Created concept, pitch, and demo for a VR meditation app that integrates with work calendars. Won first place in CGI's VR innovation challenge, beating all competing teams.

projects.title: UX/UI Work for Telecom
projects.tagline: Enterprise B2B platform design for multi-location service management
projects.summary: Designed UX content for complex B2B platforms supporting enterprise customers managing connectivity, voice, and network services across hundreds of locations. Translated dense technical and contractual requirements into clear decision-enabling UI language. Work completed under NDA—case study available upon request.

projects.title: New Engagement Sales Support
projects.tagline: Strategic marketing content and proposals to win enterprise clients
projects.summary: Created strategic pitch decks and proposal narratives for CGI's enterprise business development team. Collaborated with sales support and leadership to tailor messaging to specific prospective clients while adhering to brand guidelines. Work completed under NDA—samples available upon request.
